source_excerpt: Argentina is a -245 favorite at DraftKings Sportsbook to claim all three points, and Algeria is +800. A draw is available at +360.
England are -145 favorites to win and take all three points at DraftKings Sportsbook , and Croatia is +425. There are +275 odds that the teams will draw and share the spoils.
Colombia is a -265 favorite to win at DraftKings Sportsbook , and Uzbekistan is +850. There are +380 odds that the teams will draw.

On DraftKings Sportsbook , the USA enters as a fairly significant favorite to take this match outright. The Americans are listed with -185 odds to win on the Moneyline, which have ticked shorter since winning their tournament opener. Meanwhile, Australia comes in as a +475 outright underdog. The odds of a draw are priced at +360 as well.

Per DraftKings Sportsbook , Spain opens as a heavy favorite to win Sunday's match. La Roja have -1000 odds on the Moneyline, which is already a dip from the -1200 odds they had to beat Cabo Verde in their opener on Monday. That match ended in a shocking 0-0 draw, while Saudi Arabia's opener against Uruguay ended at 1-1. The odds of Spain and Saudi Arabia finishing in a draw this time around are sitting at +950. Meanwhile, Saudi Arabia's Moneyline odds have been pegged at +2500.
Belgium opens as a clear favorite on DraftKings Sportsbook , sitting at -233 on the 90-minute Moneyline. Iran is +733 to pull off the upset, while the draw is +400.
France is a massive favorite on DraftKings Sportsbook, sitting at -1100 on the 90-minute Moneyline. Iraq is +2500 to pull off the upset, while the draw is listed at +850.
